description: An application or daemon deployed to one or more servers or to Fly.io. Each deploy_to target produces an independent service instance with its own DNS records, secrets, and config files.
title: Service

deploy_to.description: Server keys to deploy this service on (e.g. 'au-malatang'). Use 'fly' for Fly.io deployments. Each entry produces a separate service instance keyed as {service}-{target}.

features.description: Feature flags that provision resources, expose template values or control generated config for this service instance.

b2.description: Provision a Backblaze B2 bucket and application key for this service. Exposes b2_bucket_name, b2_application_key_id, b2_application_key_sensitive, and b2_endpoint as template variables.

monitoring.description: Include this service in generated monitoring configuration. Does not provision resources or expose template variables.

monitoring_alerts.description: Attach generated monitoring alerts to this service when monitoring is enabled. Does not provision resources or expose template variables.

password.description: Generate a random password for this service. Exposes password_sensitive and password_hash_sensitive (bcrypt) as template variables. Stored in 1Password.

pushover.description: Expose the configured Pushover application token and user/group key for this service. Exposes pushover_application_token_sensitive and pushover_user_key_sensitive as template variables.

resend.description: Provision a Resend API key for outbound email from this service. Exposes resend_api_key_sensitive as a template variable.

secrets.description: Additional secrets for this service. Omit bootstrap_type for a manually supplied 1Password field; generated types bootstrap the field and then read it back. Each secret is exposed as {name}_sensitive on the service object.

bootstrap_length.description: Byte count for hex/base64 types; character count for string/alphanumeric types. Omit for manually supplied 1Password fields.

bootstrap_type.description: Initial generated secret format. Omit to create an empty concealed 1Password field; hex/base64/string/alphanumeric bootstrap generated values and then read back from 1Password.

name.description: Secret identifier. Exposed as {name}_sensitive on the service. Must be lowercase alphanumeric or underscore.

tailscale.description: Generate a Tailscale auth key for this service. Exposes tailscale_auth_key_sensitive as a template variable. Used by services that run their own Tailscale node (e.g. Gatus on Fly.io).

identity.description: Human-readable identifiers and dashboard metadata for this service.

description.description: One-line description of what this service does. Shown in dashboards and status pages.

group.description: Dashboard group. Defaults to the target server description for server-targeted services or Applications when no target server exists.

name.description: Short identifier used to build FQDNs and subdomain labels (e.g. 'vaultwarden'). Combined with the target server FQDN: {name}.{server_fqdn}.{domain}.

service.description: Implementation key used to select templates from services/{service}.

title.description: Display name shown in Homepage, Komodo, 1Password, and monitoring (e.g. 'Vaultwarden').

username.description: Admin username for this service. Stored in 1Password alongside the generated password.

imports.description: Private service dependencies exposed to this service template as services.{alias}.

services.description: Map of local alias to target-expanded service key. Values support template interpolation with ${defaults.*}, ${server.*}, ${servers.*}, ${service.*}, and public ${services.*}.

networking.description: Network exposure configuration for this service.

expose.description: Access level for this service. 'tailscale': accessible only via Tailscale (tailscale-only middleware). 'internal': accessible on the internal network and Tailscale (internal-only middleware). 'external': publicly accessible via direct DNS. 'cloudflare': publicly accessible via Cloudflare Zero Trust tunnel. Null uses no middleware and creates no DNS records.

port.description: Port the service listens on. Required for Fly.io deployments. Used as the Traefik backend port for TrueNAS standard services, and as the Fly.io internal_port.

scheme.description: Backend scheme. Required for Traefik routing and URL DNS record generation. fqdn_internal is always computed for server-targeted services regardless of this field; fqdn_external is computed when expose is 'external' or 'cloudflare'. Null disables URL DNS records.

ssl.description: Whether the service is accessed over HTTPS. Controls the URL scheme in health checks and monitoring. Defaults to true.

ssl_validation.description: Whether to validate the TLS certificate when health-checking this service. Set to false for self-signed certificates. Defaults to true.

urls.description: Custom public hostnames for this service (e.g. 'status.example.com'). DNS records (CNAME, wildcard, ACME delegation) are automatically created for any hostname that ends with a managed zone.

docker.description: Configuration for Docker-based deployments (Komodo and TrueNAS custom apps).

env.description: Extra environment variables merged into the service's computed env map. Values are stringified and quoted by render templates. String values support template interpolation with ${defaults.*}, ${server.*}, ${servers.*}, ${service.*}, and ${services.*}. String arrays render as '+'-joined values.

labels.description: Extra Docker labels merged into generated routing labels. Values support template interpolation with ${defaults.*}, ${server.*}, ${servers.*}, ${service.*}, and ${services.*}.

app_name.description: Fly.io app name override. If null, defaults to {organization.name}-{identity.name}; the matching {app_name}.fly.dev hostname is added to the computed service URLs.

cpu_kind.description: CPU type. 'shared' is cheaper and suitable for most workloads; 'performance' provides dedicated CPU time.

image.description: Pre-built Docker image to deploy (e.g. 'ghcr.io/owner/image:tag'). If null, a Dockerfile in the service's template directory is used instead.

machine_count.description: Desired number of Fly Machines for this app. Null leaves the existing machine count unchanged.

memory_mb.description: RAM in MiB to allocate to each machine.

region.description: Fly.io primary region code (e.g. 'syd', 'lax'). Determines where machines are provisioned by default.

truenas.description: Configuration for TrueNAS catalog app deployments. Custom apps are inferred from docker-compose.yaml or docker-compose.yaml.tftpl files.

catalog_app.description: TrueNAS catalog app name. Defaults to identity.service when null.

containers.description: Container names that should receive generated labels for TrueNAS catalog apps. Defaults to identity.service when empty.

port_key.description: Primary TrueNAS network port key that receives networking.port as port_number.
